final:
module SRAM (
    input wire clk,
    input wire WE,
    input wire RE,
    input wire [3:0] addr,
    input wire [15:0] D_in,
    output reg [15:0] D_out
);
    reg [15:0] memory [15:0]; // 16 × 16-bit memory

    always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (WE) begin memory[addr] <= D_in ; // Write data to memory
  end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (RE) begin D_out <= memory[addr] ; // Read data from memory
  end
  end
endmodule
